books.title: The Pit-Prop Syndicate
books.author: Freeman Wills Crofts
books.summary: A British wine merchant on business in France stumbles across a syndicate with something to hide, and resolves to discover their secret.

books.title: The Door with Seven Locks
books.author: Edgar Wallace
books.summary: A soon-to-retire Scotland Yard investigator, insulted when asked to investigate the theft of a library book, finds that it’s a case he can’t put down.

books.title: Wonderful Adventures of Mrs. Seacole in Many Lands
books.author: Mary Seacole
books.summary: A British Creole woman provides medical assistance during the Crimean War after her travels around Panama.

books.title: The Lives and Opinions of Eminent Philosophers
books.author: Diogenes Laërtius
books.summary: Brief biographies of the prominent philosophers of ancient Greece.

books.title: The Enchanted Castle
books.author: E. Nesbit
books.summary: Three children discover a wonderful garden and castle, and come into possession of a magic ring which entangles them in many strange adventures.

books.title: The Seagull
books.author: Anton Chekhov
books.summary: A has-been actress, her ambitious playwright son, a male writer, and an aspiring young actress struggle to realize their romantic and artistic aims.

books.title: Pygmalion
books.author: George Bernard Shaw
books.summary: An arrogant upper-class professor bets a colleague he can transform a simple flower girl into a “Duchess” in just six months.

books.title: Five Children and It
books.author: E. Nesbit
books.summary: Five children encounter an ancient magical creature who grants them wishes—all of which go comically wrong.

books.title: The Return of the Native
books.author: Thomas Hardy
books.summary: A young woman longs to find a husband who can deliver her from her unexciting rural life.

books.title: The Return
books.author: Walter de la Mare
books.summary: After visiting a graveyard, a man finds his appearance has mysteriously changed.

books.title: The Worst Journey in the World
books.author: Apsley Cherry-Garrard
books.summary: The travelogue of a member of Robert Scott’s ill-fated Antarctic expedition of 1910.

books.title: The Secret Adversary
books.author: Agatha Christie
books.summary: Tommy and Tuppence try to solve a mystery, only to find themselves embroiled in schemes of murder, millionaires, and diplomats.

books.title: My Four Weeks in France
books.author: Ring Lardner
books.summary: A sports columnist and humorist travels to France as a war correspondent during World War I and recounts his experiences on the assignment.

books.title: The End of the World
books.author: Geoffrey Dennis
books.summary: A philosophical reflection on how the end of the world would unfold based on hypothetical variables and relevant knowledge and historical context.

books.title: The Rubáiyát of Omar Khayyám
books.author: Omar Khayyám
books.summary: Three volumes of lyrical quatrains about the joys of living, the meaning of existence, and what it means to lead a happy life.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: Ring Lardner
books.summary: A collection of short stories by Ring Lardner.

books.title: A Strange Manuscript Found in a Copper Cylinder
books.author: James De Mille
books.summary: A shipwrecked sailor travels through a portal to a lost world populated by fantastic creatures and a strange civilization.

books.title: Just So Stories
books.author: Rudyard Kipling
books.summary: A collection of short humorous fables for children, most purporting to tell the origin of animal characteristics such as the camel’s hump.

books.title: Barlaam and Ioasaph
books.author: Anonymous
books.summary: A monk converts a cloistered young prince to Christianity.

books.title: The Worst Journey in the World
books.author: Apsley Cherry-Garrard
books.summary: The travelogue of a member of Robert Scott’s ill-fated Antarctic expedition of 1910.
